slice

**Life at slice** 




  





 Life so good, you’d think we’re kidding
 


* Competitive salaries. Period.
* An extensive medical insurance that looks out for our employees \\& their dependants. We’ll love you and take care of you, our promise.
* Flexible working hours. Just don’t call us at 3AM, we like our sleep schedule.

title: LLM Research Intern
description:

 We are seeking a highly motivated LLM Research Intern with strong hands\\-on skills in PyTorch and a solid foundation in deep learning and NLP. The intern will work on large language model (LLM)\\-based systems across downstream tasks such as Neural Machine Translation (NMT), Natural Language Processing (NLP), and Natural Language Understanding (NLU).
 


* This role is ideal for candidates who have expertise implementing research ideas, running experiments, optimizing models, and contributing to real\\-world multilingual AI systems. The intern will collaborate closely with research scientists and engineers to build scalable, efficient, and high\\-quality language technologies, particularly for entertainment\\-domain translation and related multilingual applications.



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Implement and experiment with LLM\\-based models using PyTorch, including fine\\-tuning, evaluation, and optimization.
* Assist in building and improving multilingual pipelines for tasks such as NMT, NLP, and dialogue processing.
* Support model training and inference optimization, including memory\\-efficient training, batching strategies, and decoding improvements.
* Conduct experiments, run benchmarks, and perform error analysis to improve model performance.
* Help integrate models into prototype or production\\-ready systems under guidance from senior researchers.

 Remote within India.

* The working hours are from 9:00 to 18:00 (Monday to Friday) full\\-time.



  





**Essential Education:** 




 Ph.D./Masters in Computer Science background/Bachelor’s with hands\\-on experience on Python with an applications in Language Processing.
 



  





**Skills required:** 




  





**Essential Skills:** 



* Strong hands\\-on experience in PyTorch (mandatory)
* Strong Python programming skills (mandatory)
* Good understanding of deep learning fundamentals (transformers, backpropagation, optimization, regularization)
* Familiarity with NLP concepts and language models
* Ability to implement research ideas and run controlled experiments.



  





**Good to have Skills:** 



* Experience with Hugging Face Transformers or similar LLM frameworks.
* Prior project or internship experience in NLP or LLM\\-based systems.
* Familiarity with GPU training environments and experiment tracking tools.
* Ability to read and understand ML research papers.



  





**Our Values:**




  





**Dreams \\& Curiosity:** 
 Pioneer the future with dreams and curiosity.

**Integrity \\& Sincerity:**

Our WAF product includes a high performance demanding deep packet inspection engine with reverse proxy architecture, interacting with our Active Threat Intelligence (ATI) cloud, which uses Machine Learning and Big Data to identify bots and other threats to our customers’ applications.

title: Senior Application Specialist
description:
*Cadmatic is a leading global developer of digital and intelligent 3D\\-based design, engineering, and information management solutions for the marine, process, and construction industries. Our story began in the 1980s and today we have over 330 proactive, engaged, and growth\\-minded people in 20 countries around the world. Over 6000 customers are using our software solutions in 60 countries, and we are just getting started.* 




  





 Now we are looking for
 **a Senior Application Specialist** 
 to strengthen our global Aftersales team
 **in India.** 




  





 In this role, you will demonstrate our software solutions to our customers and help with their software installation, implementation, and usage. Your software range covers CADMATIC 3D Plant and Outfitting design and P\\&ID. Your daily work is also about solving customer inquiries and providing customer trainings on\\-site and remotely. You turn tricky questions into successful service experiences and simple solutions. In practice you enjoy shifting back and forth from technical support role to sales support role. If you recognize yourself from this, this might be the perfect role for you!
 



  





 You will be based in one of our India offices: Mumbai, Goa, Bangalore, or Ahmedabad, and you will report to our Technical Manager.
 



  





**In short, your job includes:** 



* Helping and educating our customers with their software installation, implementation, and usage by providing technical support and training.
* Participating in the presales process as our technical software expert giving software demonstrations.
* As part of our customer success team in India, you will cooperate and work closely with our global customer success, sales, product development and other professionals in the team contributing to our ambitious growth plans.



  





**We wish you to bring:** 



* Degree in process, marine or mechanical engineering.
* Working experience in Process \\& Industry sector i.e., in chemical, power, water treatment or paper \\& pulp company or Marine sector.
* Practical experience in engineering/design or 3D CAD administration.
* Strong experience in a similar role and deep understanding of the industry.
* Fluency in English.
* Willingness and readiness to travel.



  





**Our ideal candidate** 
 would be a technical expert who finds it rewarding to work closely with our customers. You are good at translating complex customer cases into simple solutions. You have good communication and presentation skills, and you know how to prioritize your work. Your working style is independent, but you enjoy working in a team too.
 



  





**Cadmatic as an employer:** 



* A stable, global company with a long history, strong future, and cutting‑edge software solutions.
* A friendly, supportive, and truly multicultural work environment where we succeed together.
* Autonomy, ownership, and trust: you’re encouraged to do your best work and develop professionally.
* Competitive benefits and flexible working practices that support work‑life balance.
* An engineer‑minded, people‑first culture — we take our work seriously but also enjoy ourselves along the way.
* Global opportunities to relocate to other countries and international travelling opportunities.



  





**Interested to join our team?** 
 Please submit your application by
 **12 April** 
 . If you have any questions, feel free to contact our hiring manager, Vice President of Customer Success, Marko Kuusela via email
 **marko.kuusela@cadmatic.com** 
 . Please note that we only accept applications submitted to our Applicant Tracking System (ATS).
